children.heading: Members in Space Force active status: amount of annual training or active duty service required
Individual ready guardians: designation; mobilization category
Members not on sustained duty: agreements concerning conditions of service
Orders to active duty: with consent of member
Orders to active duty: without consent of member
Transfer to inactive status: initial service obligation not complete
Members of Space Force: credit for service for purposes of laws providing pay and benefits for members, dependents, and survivors
Policy for order to active duty based upon determination by Congress
Strength in grade: Space Force general officers in a Space Force active status, not on sustained duty
